title:
Lesson 1:
I'll Pick You Up / Don't Go
description: 'Seni almaya geliyorum' = I'm coming to pick you up. 'Beni almaya gel' = Come pick me up. 'Gitme' = Don't go (to someone about to leave or go somewhere).

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: How are you going to get to the airport?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: I don't know. Can you come pick me up?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.turkish: Tabii. Seni almaya geliyorum, saat beşte.
dialogue.english: Of course. I'm coming to pick you up at five.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Great. Don't leave without letting me know.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: If I can make it, don't go to the airport alone.

vocabulary.english: I'm coming to pick you up
